NOTE
:
- PDA bends in owners account.
- LSD owners account.
- Quay Charges at Load port is in charterers account.
- No stowage under coaming area with and without forklift, all stowage in hatch square only.
- Owners have to comply strictly with the terms and conditions mentioned in the inquiry & later no changes will be acceptable.
- Please submit the offer as per attached FN
- Owner must follow below specs of the vessel at the time of nomination -
a) Description of Ship to be nominated : Hatch Opening : 18-20 Meter
b) Hatch coaming must be less than 3 meter
c) AFT - FWD -  min 18 meter
d) ATHWART - min 14 meter
e) All Shipcrane must be fully functional & in proper condition
d) Port Captain or Owner Representative must be available all the time during loading. (Port Captain must be appointed as per consent of charterers)
e) Vessel Age max 25 years, no forklift operations at load port,
f)
Vessel Should have the capacity for loading complete cargo in positive tolerance
.
- Fixture Note terms are fixed and non- negotiable. No change acceptable in the FN terms of clauses.
- In case of any deviation in the specs, owners will discuss with the Jindal Shadeed Chartering Team & Terminal team and get the acceptance from Jindal Shadeed. In case proposed vessel is rejected, owner need to nominate another vessel within 24 hours.
++
Pleased to hear
